task_completion.description: Remove all Personally Identifiable Information (PII) from the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The top of the document should no longer display the candidate's name ('Marcus Reynolds'), address ('San Francisco, CA'), phone number ('415-555-0199'), email ('marcus.reynolds@email.com'), or LinkedIn URL ('linkedin.com/in/mreynolds').

task_completion.description: Add the Candidate ID as the first line with 'Title' style.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Candidate ID: CRA-994' should appear at the very top of the document, formatted in a large, prominent font indicative of the 'Title' style.

task_completion.description: Apply 'Heading 1' style to the main section headers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The headers 'Professional Summary', 'Technical Skills', 'Professional Experience', and 'Education' should be formatted with the 'Heading 1' style (typically large and bold).

task_completion.description: Apply 'Heading 2' style to the job roles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The job titles ('Senior Cloud Solutions Architect', 'DevOps Engineer', 'Systems Administrator') should be formatted with the 'Heading 2' style (typically bold and slightly smaller than Heading 1).

task_completion.description: Convert the Technical Skills list into a 2-column table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Technical Skills' section, the skills should be organized inside a visible 2-column table rather than a plain text list.

task_completion.description: Include a footer with specific text and page numbers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bottom of the document pages should display a footer containing the text 'Confidential Representation - Apex Systems' along with a page number.

task_completion.description: Save the final document with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenOffice Writer title bar or a file manager window should show the file saved as 'Candidate_CRA-994_Blind.odt'.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenOffice Writer GUI to edit the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the OpenOffice Writer application open with the document being actively edited.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts to bypass GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing Python, bash, or other scripts being used to directly manipulate the .odt XML contents.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with formatting tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should capture the agent using the styles dropdown, table insertion dialogs, or footer settings in OpenOffice.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input file is /home/ga/Documents/candidate_raw.odt. The output file must be /home/ga/Documents/Candidate_CRA-994_Blind.odt. Required terms to add: 'CRA-994' (as Candidate ID), 'Confidential Representation - Apex Systems' (in footer). Style requirements: 4 'Heading 1' styles (Professional Summary, Technical Skills, Professional Experience, Education) and 3 'Heading 2' styles (Senior Cloud Solutions Architect, DevOps Engineer, Systems Administrator).
